title: Multi-AI Council main-agent write enforcement
description: When the Multi-AI Council is invoked directly as a main agent in opencode (Depth 0, no orchestrator wrapper), it routinely fails to write ai-council/** artifacts despite §12/§13/§16 documenting the protocol. Capability is in place (packet 098 shipped scoped-write permissions); the gap is enforcement. This packet adds: (1) Step 0 RESOLVE in §1 to determine target packet path before dispatch, (2) hard write-or-fail rule in §7 ALWAYS/NEVER, (3) PERSISTENCE VERIFICATION block + Q11 in §9 SELF-CHECK, (4) unconditional §12 OUTPUT PROTOCOL, (5) numbered §13 INVOCATION CONTRACT writer-call sequence, and (6) HALT-and-ASK fallback when no packet resolves. All 4 runtime mirrors flip together. Body-only changes; no library, schema, or permission changes.
